> Hello,
>

>
> According to ports/MOVED portupgrade changed his category at 
> 2007-02-05, so you must have only one portupgrade now in 
> ports-mgmt/portupgrade.
>
>  
>
> Try to upgrade you port collection fully from cvsup (check if server 
> not out of sync) server or via portsnap if available.
>
>  
>
>  
>
>  
>
>  
>
This may be a bug in portsnap. The ports are up to date.

eureka# uname -mrs
FreeBSD 6.3-RELEASE-p1 i386

eureka# portsnap fetch update
Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 4 mirrors found.
Fetching snapshot tag from portsnap2.FreeBSD.org... done.
Latest snapshot on server matches what we already have.
No updates needed.
Ports tree is already up to date.

eureka# locate portaudit | grep /usr/ports/ | grep portaudit$
/usr/ports/ports-mgmt/portaudit
/usr/ports/security/portaudit
